title: Day 10 Lesson 2 ( Video )Talking about the student-s dormitory
html:
Day 10 - Lesson 2

りょう の がくせい の はなし を する　(ryoo no gaksee no hanashi o suru)  = Talking about the student's dormitory

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ　(kyooshitsu) = Classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters):  がくせい　ふたり  (gaksee hutari) = Two students

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
